items.title: Transfer rumors, news: Man City, Chelsea want Brentford's Igor Thiago
items.description: Man City, Chelsea and Bayern Munich are tracking Brenford's Igor Thiago, while Man United look to move on André Onana. Transfer Talk has the latest.
